\tzpentry{ID3564}{Phase Angle Functional}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3564 introduces Phase Angle Functional as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ I(t) = \int \overline{\psi_1(r,\theta;\sigma_r(t))} \cdot \delta_\epsilon(r) \cdot \psi_2(r,\theta)\, r\,dr\,d\theta. \]
